introduction: Haluk manages the textile factory, which he took over from his father, with his wife Güler. Having difficulty maintaining his power at home and at work, Haluk left the jobs under the control of Güler, a talented manager, and got used to living in the shadow of his wife. After a long break, retired foreman Necati, who came to visit his workplace, will inevitably highlight Güler instead of Haluk and make Haluk's inability to manage the business visible. With the presence of Necati Usta and the power crisis between the two wives reaching an extreme level, at the end of the day, there will be an unexpected person who suffers from this.
